title: Master v0.4.7 Access Cleanup Error Recovery Fix
notes:
Fixes Access Control cleanup UI so failed delete/revoke attempts do not leave inputs/buttons stuck.

Changes:
- Adds Reset Cleanup UI button.
- Pressing Escape releases stuck focus.
- Re-enables inputs/buttons after cleanup errors.
- Removes confirm dialog focus traps from manual cleanup actions.
- Error messages now say UI recovered.
- Keeps manual account/key cleanup fields from v0.4.6.
- Keeps Discord alerts/history entries.
